posts.highlight: 巴厘岛万人祭海游行 · 壮观人流
posts.description: Thousands of Balinese in white traditional attire descending to Atuh Beach for Nyepi ritual
posts.description_zh: 数千名巴厘岛人身着白衣，缓缓走向阿图海滩举行祭海仪式，壮观震撼
posts.caption_en: One of the most remarkable processions I've ever witnessed. Thousands of Balinese making the descent to Atuh Beach, carrying temple heirlooms to the ocean to be cleansed before Nyepi.
posts.caption_zh: 我见过最震撼的游行之一。数千名巴厘岛人手持庙宇传家宝，走向阿图海滩，在宁静节前祭海净化。
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Thousands of Balinese in white traditional attire descending to Atuh Beach for Nyepi ritual. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.caption_en: 물장구 치러 나온 병아리🐥 (The chick who came out to splash in puddles 🐥) — On rainy days, she wears a cute hat to go out ☔️

posts.highlight: 新手奶爸 · 带娃就近探索巴厘岛
posts.description: New father Jord explores Bali close to home during baby Penny's nap windows
posts.description_zh: 初为人父的 Jord 趁宝宝 Penny 午睡的空档，在家附近15分钟范围探索巴厘岛
posts.caption_en: Becoming a father three months ago has left me with a lot less time to head off on bigger trips, and has forced me to slow down and spend time exploring closer to home.
posts.caption_zh: 三个月前成为父亲后，长途旅行少了很多，被迫慢下来，开始探索家附近的美景。
